description: Score protein variants with a trained SynFit multi-objective fitness model.
functions: Loads a SynFit joint 2-head checkpoint (best_model.pth from Stage-2 training).
Computes per-objective fitness scores for each variant via masked log-likelihood ratios over the mutated positions.
Returns a CSV with one column per fitness objective and an optional non-dominated (Pareto-frontier) ranking.
Backbone is facebook/esm2_t33_650M_UR50D, pre-cached in the image (runtime has no internet).
Supports models trained with exactly 2 objectives - SynFit's joint head is hardcoded to 2 heads.

inputs.name: checkpoint
inputs.descr: best_model.pth produced by SynFit-Train (Stage-2 joint shared-module training).

inputs.name: wt_sequence
inputs.descr: Single-letter amino-acid sequence the variants are defined relative to. Mutation indices are 1-indexed against this sequence.

inputs.name: variants_csv
inputs.descr: CSV with a 'mutant' column (e.g. 'A126C' or 'A126C:G130T' for multi-mutants). 'mutated_sequence' is built from wt_sequence + mutant if missing.

inputs.name: metric_names
inputs.descr: Comma-separated names for the two objectives, in the order the model was trained (head A first, then head B). Used only for output column naming.

inputs.name: batch_size
inputs.descr: Sequences per forward pass. Lower if you hit GPU OOM on long proteins.

inputs.name: compute_pareto
inputs.descr: Add a 'pareto_rank' column via non-dominated sorting (1 = on the Pareto frontier).
